# libredash semantic-models describe

Describe a semantic model

## Usage

```sh
libredash semantic-models describe <model> [flags]
```

## Options

| Flag | Type | Default | Description |
| --- | --- | --- | --- |
| `--target` | string | `` | LibreDash server URL |
| `--token` | string | `` | API token |
